subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! When the spiritual springtime cometh, the Merciful breeze shall blow, and the clouds of divine knowledge shall pour forth their bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان چون موسم بهار روحانی رسد نسیم رحمانی وزد غمام عرفان بفیضان اید
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @being a source of light; guidance, @bringing forth results; fruit, @love and unity
